user_query: I'm planning a road trip across the United States and I want to capture beautiful landscapes along the way. Can you help me find scenic images of different states using real-time image search? Furthermore, I would like to search for email addresses of professional photographers who specialize in landscape photography. Limit the results to 100.

TaskList.description: Perform a real-time image search for scenic landscapes in various U.S. states.
Search for email addresses of professional landscape photographers.
